base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mountain_bg_snow_applied_overworld — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Snow palette overlay applied to Overworld base — gray/white hills for snow-theme levels in Lost Levels / FDS Minus World. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
